name: Deep Rewind Test Scenario
description: A scenario where clients first collaborate for 2 rounds, then client 0 introduces an inbound exclusion against client 1 in round 3. This tests the deep_rewind mechanism that retroactively removes client 1's influence from client 0's model.

expected_tracks_round_3.track_0_no1: Track for client 0 that excludes client 1's contributions
expected_tracks_round_3.global: Global track (for clients not involved in disagreements)

expected_tracks_round_4.track_0_no1: Track for client 0 that excludes client 1's contributions (ongoing)
expected_tracks_round_4.global: Global track (for clients not involved in disagreements) (ongoing)

expected_tracks_round_5.track_0_no1: Track for client 0 that excludes client 1's contributions (ongoing)
expected_tracks_round_5.global: Global track (for clients not involved in disagreements) (ongoing)

round_1_rules.description: All clients should be on global track in round 1

round_2_rules.description: All clients should be on global track in round 2

round_3_rules.description: Client 0 should be on a track that excludes client 1
Clients 1 and 2 should share a track

0.description: Client 0 disagrees with client 1 from round 3 onwards
